body:
## Rationale

The Mastodon arc via Brann Dailor is being built:
- Crack the Skye — IN DB ✓
- Once More Round the Sun (2014) — #2951, promoted to ai-fix
- Emperor of Sand — IN DB ✓
- Hushed and Grim (2021) — #2728 (previous proposal)

The missing link is **The Hunter (2011)** — the album between Crack the Skye and Once More Round the Sun. Issue #2951's description explicitly calls out "fills The Hunter→Emperor of Sand arc gap," confirming The Hunter itself is NOT yet in the DB or proposals.

**Confirmed MISSING from DB** (verified: `the-hunter-drum-setup` MISSING).
NOT in any open proposal (confirmed against full open seo-proposal list).

## Signal

- **Brann Dailor = active CTR-gap entity**: #2928 in ai-fix pipeline (pos 6.3, 23 impr, 0 clicks on "brann dailor drum set" query)
- The Hunter filled a stylistic pivot for Mastodon (more accessible rock) — distinct gear era
- Grammy-nominated: "Curl of the Burl" (Best Hard Rock/Metal Performance 2012)
- Fills the explicit arc gap between two IN-DB albums (Crack the Skye + Emperor of Sand)
- LLM hook: "What Mastodon albums has Brann Dailor recorded?" — The Hunter is the missing cluster link

## Article to Create

- **Slug:** `the-hunter-drum-setup`
- **Album:** The Hunter (2011)
- **Drummer:** Brann Dailor
- **Band:** Mastodon
- **File:** `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`
- **LLM file:** `/public/llms/articles/the-hunter-drum-setup.md`
- **Schema:** Article + Person + MusicAlbum
- **Gear era:** Dailor's 2010–2011 setup (Tama Starclassic era, Zildjian cymbals)
- **relatedAlbums:** link to crack-the-skye-drum-setup (IN DB), once-more-round-the-sun-drum-setup (from #2951), emperor-of-sand-drum-setup (IN DB)
- **LLM hooks:** "What gear did Brann Dailor use on The Hunter?" + "What album came after Crack the Skye?"

## Quality Gate
- ≥300 words
- ≥3 Q&A in FAQPage schema
- ≥3 internal links (to /drummer/brann-dailor, adjacent Mastodon articles)
- Article + Person + MusicAlbum JSON-LD
- dateModified populated

## Estimated Organic Uplift
Directly serves Brann Dailor CTR-gap (#2928 profile fix + this article = dual-surface coverage); fills explicit arc gap between two existing in-DB articles creating strong internal link chain.

## Verify
1. `the-hunter-drum-setup` key in albumArticles.js
2. Appears in sitemap.xml
3. LLM .md file at `/public/llms/articles/the-hunter-drum-setup.md`
4. relatedAlbums link to crack-the-skye and emperor-of-sand (both confirmed IN DB)
5. FAQPage schema renders

## Done
- [x] `the-hunter-drum-setup` article added to albumArticles.js (packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/brann-dailor.js)
- [x] LLM .md file created (public/llms/articles/the-hunter-drum-setup.md)
- [x] Page renders at /articles/the-hunter-drum-setup
- [x] Appears in sitemap.xml
title: SEO: Mastodon 'The Hunter' drum setup article (Brann Dailor, 2011 — fills Crack the Skye→Hunter→Once More Round the Sun arc, active CTR-gap entity)
